overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character walking through a foggy, moonlit grassland at night. The character passes ancient stone ruins and encounters sheep resting in the field, with warm lamp posts scattered throughout the atmospheric landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered trees and lamp posts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through the foggy field, heading toward distant lights

entered.detail: tall dark pine trees framing the left side of the field
wooden post with warm glowing lantern providing light along the path
grassy field with patches of dirt forming a walking path
large dark rock outcropping visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open foggy grassland at night. Tall pine trees frame the sides while wooden lamp posts provide warm light along the path, and distant rock formations are visible through the mist.

events.description: large moss-covered stone ruins come into prominent view on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing by the ancient stone structures on the right

entered.detail: large ancient stone structure with weathered surfaces and moss
low crumbling stone wall ruins visible in the distant left

segments.scene_description: The character passes by ancient stone ruins rising on the right side of the path. The misty atmosphere continues as the camera moves past the weathered structures, with lamp posts now closer on the left and distant stone walls becoming visible.

events.description: flock of sheep comes into view resting in the grass on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past sheep lying in the grass while continuing toward distant lights

notable_agents.action: sheep lying down and resting in the grass, some looking toward the character

segments.scene_description: The character encounters sheep resting in the foggy field on the right. Ancient stone walls are visible in the distance ahead as the journey continues through the atmospheric night landscape, passing the peaceful animals.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit, foggy grassland that transitions from a wooded path into an area of ancient ruins and resting livestock. It begins with the character walking through open fields framed by tall pine trees, where wooden lamp posts cast a warm glow through the dense mist. As the camera advances, the scene shifts toward the right to reveal weathered stone ruins rising from the ground, while the lamp posts move closer on the left. The journey then continues past these ancient structures, opening up to a field where sheep rest peacefully in the fog. Finally, the camera moves forward toward distant stone walls that emerge from the atmospheric night landscape.
